name: browserlane-website
description: Documentation site for browserlane — browser automation for humans and AI agents.
//bundler: dev/build pin --webpack on purpose: Next 16.2.9's default Turbopack cannot load fumadocs-mdx@15.0.12's loaders. Repro (clean .next): `next build` (and `next dev` on first MDX page request) fails with `Error: require() of ES Module .../fumadocs-mdx/dist/webpack/mdx.js from .../next/dist/compiled/loader-runner/LoaderRunner.js not supported` (Turbopack: 33 errors / dev returns HTTP 500). Webpack bundles the same source cleanly (build exit 0, 24 pages). Revisit when fumadocs-mdx ships Turbopack-compatible (non-CJS-require) loaders.
//reference: cli-reference/ and mcp-reference/ MDX are AUTO-GENERATED from the `bl` binary by scripts/gen-reference.mjs. `gen:reference` runs it; `prebuild` re-runs it before every `next build` so the committed MDX stays fresh. Binary resolves via BL_BIN > ../target/release/bl > `bl` on PATH; prebuild fails loudly if none is found.
